name: Terror Diversion
short_description: This is a text-based horror game in which you investigate mysterious urban legends. Along the way, the player takes on the role of a character who gets “lost” and encounters a series of random events.
detailed_description:
Terror Diversion is a text-based adventure game filled with numerous random events. You play as a girl haunted by spirits, who, after taking a leave from school, arrives in a strange town. Here, she must investigate a series of mysterious incidents while making sure she doesn't collapse from exhaustion or lose her sanity.



Features:
  • No combat, the developer has thoughtfully removed this part for you (actually, out of laziness).
  • A dice-based check system involving four attributes: Strength, Dexterity, Charisma, and Perception.
  • Multiple playable characters, each with their own backstories and stats.
  • Rich scripts and short stories, each with different flavors and themes.
  • Tons of random events; if you fail an investigation, blame the "dealer" and try again.

supported_languages: English, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
